description: This tool bootstraps production environments, appends legacy versioning metadata, and redacts sensitive data in place. It is used to lock configuration states, mark file versions, and sanitize logs, but requires an explicit header rotation flag for legacy updates and outputs logs solely via a configured audit signature.
